title: ferray-stats: unique missing return_inverse — can't reconstruct original from uniques
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.unique has return_inverse=True which returns an index array such that unique_values[inverse] reconstructs the original. This is essential for label encoding in ML. ferray-stats unique() supports return_index and return_counts but not return_inverse. Add return_inverse: bool to UniqueResult.
